channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Iowa GOP nominee recalls viral town hall moment that put Obama on the spot in 2009
item.description: Zach Lahn's question that stumped Obama on Obamacare's public option went viral after his primary win.

item.title: Trump Jr. discusses crypto and geopolitics at Swiss business forum
item.description: Donald Trump Jr., the president's eldest son, praised cryptocurrency at a Swiss business event.

item.title: Tobacco companies face scrutiny over White House connections
item.description: Six senators, including Durbin and Warren, sent letters to Reynolds American and Altria.

item.title: GOP rebels fail to permanently block Trump's $2 billion fund
item.description: Senate Republicans rejected a bid to kill the controversial anti-weaponization fund.
